title: Hire Us - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
The Murthy Law Firm can conveniently and efficiently consult and/or represent clients located anywhere in the United States or abroad on U.S. immigration matters.
Click the links in the sidebar to fill out a simple form to indicate whether you would like to consult with one of our attorneys or engage our firm for your case. The Employer Inquiry Form is for those who wish to discuss immigration related to their business or their employees. Individuals & families should use the Individual Inquiry Form . Information on fees and costs involved is available in the Fees & Billing section.
If you prefer, you may call 410.356.5440:
Mon – Fri, 8:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m., Eastern Time, U.S.
Or you may send an eMail to law@murthy.com , stating your desire to be represented. Please include a brief overview of your current status or situation.
Once it has been determined that the Murthy Law Firm will represent you, you will receive a legal representation agreement (LRA) from our Client Services Department. The LRA is specific to your procedure and differs according to whether the client is a company or an individual / family.
The LRA contains the details of the process and a breakdown of the various fees, including USCIS fees. After the LRA and the required initial payments are returned to us, you will be assigned a client ID or case number and your file will be activated and sent to a legal department with a specific attorney / paralegal team designated to your case.
The paralegal will update you on the progress of your case. If you have legal questions or need advice about how to proceed or about other factors that may change or complicate your process, the attorney handling your case will consult with you. By law, paralegals are not permitted to give legal advice. Any question of a legal nature must be directed to an attorney.
Thank you for your interest in the Murthy Law Firm. We look forward to helping you, your family and friends in U.S. immigration matters!
